description: Directed service dependency graph. An edge {from: A, to: B} means A calls/depends-on B. http-receiver is the ingest edge: it forwards writes to the large metric ingestor, which writes to olapdb-server (the olapdb write backend).

edges.note: commits write txns to the olapdb write backend (olapdb-server-headless)

note: Request flow A->B; causally the slow/unreachable callee olapdb-server backs up the ingestor, which backs up http-receiver at the edge.
